title: Mirage Herringbone Cotton Weave Throw with coloured Tassels Fringes, 175 x 250cm, 70" x 100", Light Grey
features: 100% Cotton Classic Herringbone Chevron Design, chunky fringed edges
Extra soft heavy weight superior quality Cotton Throw
Perfect for the living room or the bedroom
description: THROW COLOUR: Light Grey THROW SIZE: 175 x 250cm (70" x 100") 100% Cotton Classic Herringbone Chevron Design, chunky fringed edges. Stylish traditional design to create a versatile throw with lots of possible uses around the home. Ideal cover for chairs, sofas and beds etc. as well as in the car for picnics. These beautiful Bedspreads are made in India. Wash: 30 degree Wash. Hand or Machine Wash Separately. Use Non Bleach mild detergent. These throws are made from natural fibres and therefore may shrink slightly after washing. Care: Care should be taken when in contact with lighter coloured flooring or furnishings as colour may transfer. Remove immediately if wet.
